sentence: Agdistis yayingumthandazeli wamaPhrygia owaziwayo ngamandla akhe angaqhelekanga. Wavela kwimibhalo yamaGrike njengomfazi ongumhlanga owamkelwa njengomntu owoyikekayo. Ngokweentsomi, uAgdistis wayenomzimba owohlukileyo, ochazwe njengohlanganiso lomntu wesifazane kunye nezitho zangasese zowesilume. Le ngxube yabangela ukuba abantu abaninzi bame phantsi kwesoyikiso sakhe.  UAgdistis wayezulazula ePhrygia, eMzantsi kweAsia Minor, apho yayikhule khona inkcubeko yakhe. Abantu basePhrygia bambona njengoThixokazi owamkelwa njengoMnini wamahlathi. NgokukaMithology, uAgdistis wayenomthandazo omkhulu wokuba umntu angamkhonzi. Ngenxa yoko, uMnu Dionysus wathuma uHermes ukuze amthobe, kodwa uAgdistis akazange athobe.  Nangona iingxelo zikaAgdistis zingathelekanga nezinye zeentsomi zamaGrike, wayenomthandazo owamkelwa njengomthandazeli omkhulu. Ukubonakala kwakhe okungaqhelekanga, okunje kwesinye isini, kunika umdla wabantu abafuna ukwazi ngakumbi ngaye.

Ukubonakala kwakhe okungaqhelekanga, okunje kwesinye isini, kunika umdla wabantu abafuna ukwazi ngakumbi ngaye.
translations: Agdistis was a Phrygian deity known for his extraordinary powers.
He appeared in Greek literature as a reed woman who was considered terrifying.
According to myth, Agdistis had a dual nature, described as a combination of a female body with male genitalia.
This mixture caused many people to live in fear of him.
Agdistis roamed Phrygia, in southern Asia Minor, where his cult had developed.
The people of Phrygia regard him as a goddess revered as the mistress of the forests.
According to Mythology, Agdistis had a great reputation for being a person that nobody could resist.
For that reason, Mr. Dionysus sent Hermes to calm him down, but Agdistis did not calm down.
Although the stories of Agdistis are not comparable to other Greek myths, he had a prayer that was accepted as a great prayer.
His unusual appearance, like that of the opposite sex, arouses the interest of people who want to know more about him.

sentence: Ukubaleka kukaAgdistis kubonakala kwimibhalo yamaGrike, apho kuvela khona izazathu ezintle zokuba wayengumthandazeli wamandla. Ngokwemibhalo, uAgdistis wayesebenzisa amandla akhe ukulawula iintshaba zakhe, anganikezela ngamandla akhe kubawo. Ukufa kwakhe kunika umnini wokuba ubawoluphi ubunamandla angaphezu kwawesintu.  Ngenxa yokunyathela kwakhe, uAgdistis wabaneka njengokungenakuthintelwa. Oku kwenza ukuba abantu baqalise ukumbula njengomthandazeli. Wavuya ekubeni ngumbhali ochazwe njengoThixokazi. Ukubaleka kwakhe kunika umnini wokuba ngamandla akhe angaphezu kwawesintu.  UAgdistis uyabakho njengomntu onamandla, owamkelwa njengomthandazeli. Akubanga lula ukumqonda, kodwa uyabakho njengomntu owamkelwa njengomthandazeli wamandla angaphezu kwawesintu.

translations: The flight of Agdistis appears in Greek writings, where there are good reasons to suppose he was a powerful suppliant.
According to the records, Agdistis used his power to control his enemies, rather than yield his power to his father.
His death suggests that he had powers beyond those of a human.
Due to his trampling, Agdistis became uncontrollable.
This causes people to start remembering him as a supplicant.
He came to be described as a writer like Thixokazi.
His running gives his owner the power that is beyond human.
Agdistis exists as a powerful being, accepted as an intercessor.
He was not easy to understand, but he exists as a person recognized as a prayer warrior of supernatural powers.

sentence: Iindawo ezininzi zeLatvia zinezikhululo zeenqwelo-moya, kodwa uninzi lwazo lukwicandelo elincinci. Ezi zikhululo zeenqwelo-moya zidla ngokusetyenziselwa iinqwelo-moya ezincinci kunye neziqhelekileyo. Ezinye zezona zikhululo zeenqwelo-moya zibalulekileyo eLatvia ziquka iRiga International Airport, iLiepaja International Airport, iVentspils International Airport, neJēkabpils Airport.   I-Riga International Airport yeyona iskikhulu seenqwelo-moya sibalulekileyo eLatvia, kwaye inezikhondoozo ezininzi eziya eYurophu nakwezinye iindawo zehlabathi. Iikhondi zoku ya eRiga zivela kwiindawo ezininzi eYurophu, kuquka iLondon, Berlin, Paris, neStockholm.   Iindawo ezininzi zabavakatshayeli abaya eLatvia bayafika kwaRiga International Airport, yaye ukus оттуда ithuba lokuthabatha iinkwelo-moya eziya kwezinye iindawo zeLatvia.

translations: Many areas of Latvia have airports, but most of them are small regional airports.
These airports are usually used for smaller and charter flights.
Some of the most important airports in Latvia include Riga International Airport, Liepaja International Airport, Ventspils International Airport, and Jēkabpils Airport.
Riga International Airport is the main international airport in Latvia, and it has many connections to Europe and other parts of the world.
Flights to Riga come from many places in Europe, including London, Berlin, Paris, and Stockholm.
Many visitors to Latvia arrive at Riga International Airport, and from there have the opportunity to take flights to other parts of Latvia.

sentence: UCleopatra, umfazi onamandla owakha wabusha iYiputa, usenembali enkulu kubantu abaninzi. Njengomnini zelizwekazi laseAfrika, iYiputa yayisiziko samandla ezopolitiko nezoqoqosho. UCleopatra wayengumkhosikazi wasemzini owakwazi ukuqinisekisa indawo yakhe kwimeko yezopolitiko yayo. Uyintombi ka Ptolomewu XII, owawuthatha njengo ukumkani wakhe. UCleopatra wayehlakaniphile, eneembono ezintsha, wayazi iilwimi ezininzi, kubandakanywa isiYiputa, isiGrike, isiLatini, kunye nezinye.   U Cleopatra wayesebudlelwaneni no Julius Caesar, umlawuli odumileyo wamaRoma. Waye waseka ubudlelwane bakhe naye ukuze abuze amandla ayenayo iRoma. U Cleopatra no Caesar ba beleka unyana, u Caesarion. UCleopatra ulahlekelwe nguCaesar xa uMark Antony eza kwilizwe. UCleopatra waseka ubudlelwane naye no Antony, babeyakha izicwangciso zokuqalisa imfazwe eRoma.   Abantu abaninzi bacinga ukuba uCleopatra wayenobuhle obungenakulinganiswa, kodwa akukho mfanekiso ushiyekileyo uyakwazi ukubonisa ubuhle bakhe. Izazi zicinga ukuba iimpawu zokuzoba nezobugcisa zakudala azikwazanga ukurekhisa ubuhle bakhe ngokuphandle.

translations: Cleopatra, the powerful woman who once ruled Egypt, still has great significance to many people.
As the owner of an African continent, Egypt was a center of political and economic power.
Cleopatra was a foreign queen who managed to secure her place in its political landscape.
She is a daughter of Ptolemy XII, who took her as his king.
Cleopatra was intelligent, visionary, and multilingual, knowing many languages, including Egyptian, Greek, Latin, and others.
Cleopatra was in a relationship with Julius Caesar, the famous Roman ruler.
Cleopatra lost Caesar when Mark Antony came to the country.
Cleopatra formed an alliance with Antony, and they were building plans to start a war against Rome.
Many people think that Cleopatra was of unparalleled beauty, but no surviving image of her can convey her beauty.
Art critics feel that ancient drawings and art have failed to capture his true beauty.

sentence: U Cleopatrah wabhala iincwadi ezininzi ezibalulekileyo, ezikhoyo ndatshulwa nje kuphela kwinguqulo ezotshiweyo, kodwa ezininzi zazo ziyalahleka. Kwakhethwa njengo owamandla lo mfazi waseYiputa ukubusa izizwe neshoba esingapheliyo. Wayebonwa njengomnye wabantu ababhinqileyo abaqaqambileyo kwixesha lakhe elide. Abaninzi bafikriza ukuba uCleopatra wayehlakani, njengoko abekho ubuhle bezezinto zakudala yena. Abathi akazanga aphile ixesha elide. Nokuba ufile njengo mfazi osisaliphindelelo. Kodwa usenembali enkulu njengomfazi oburhurhankqileyo.

sentence: IPaki yeŌtaguro yindawo ekhenkethi ekuyo eTokyo, eJapan, eyaziwa ngembali yayo, ubugcisa, kunye nendalo. Ipakhi yinzima yeKiyomizu-dera, itempile yaseBuddha eyakhiwa ngeminyaka yee 1600, kwaye iyindawo ethandwa kakhulu kubatyelethi. Ipakhi inendawo enkulu yemihlaba, imigwira, kunye neendawo zokutyala, zizo zonke ezibonisa ubuhle bendalo baseJapan. Abatyelethi banokuhamba ngeenxa zonke ipaki, baxapheke imigwira, batyelele itempile, kwaye bonwabele ukutya kwaseJapan kwindawo zokutyela ezikhoyo.  Izakhiwo zepakhi zibonisa ubugcisa bendalo baseJapan, kwaye zinezityalo nezitye zikhethekileyo. Ipakhi yindawo ekuthula, kude nengxolo yedolophu, yenza ukuba ibe yendawo ekahle yokuphumla nokonwabela ubuhle bendalo. Abatyelethi banokubona izinto ezininzi ezithandwa, kuquka iintyatyambo ze-cherry zaseJapan, kunye neemosi zepakhi.  IPaki yeŌtaguro yenye yezindawo ezithandwa kakhulu eTokyo, kwaye iyindawo ekahle yokutyelela nokonwabela ubuhle bendalo nembali yaseJapan.

translations: Ōtaguro Park is a tourist attraction in Tokyo, Japan, known for its history, art, and nature.
The Kiyomizu-dera temple complex is impressive, a Buddhist temple built around 1600, and is a most popular place for tourists.
The park has a large area of natural scenery, walking trails, and gardens, all of which showcase Japan's natural beauty.
Visitors can walk all around the park, climb the trails, visit the temple, and enjoy Japanese food at the available restaurants.
The park buildings show Japanese natural artistry, and have unique plants and trees.
The park is a quiet area, away from the noise of the city, making it a lovely place to rest and enjoy the beauty of nature.
Visitors can see many popular things, including Japanese cherry blossoms, and packaged mosi.
Ōtaguro Park is one of the most popular places in Tokyo, and is a wonderful place to visit and enjoy the beauty of nature and history of Japan.

sentence: UCris Law ungumdlali weqonga waseMelika owaziwa kakhulu ngerebhivu yakhe kwiimuvi ezithandwayo. Wazalwa ngo-1964 eLos Angeles, California, kwaye wakhula kwindlu yentsapho yeqonga. Ukuthamani kwakhe kweqonga kwakusukela ebungeni, njengoko wayesebenza njengomdlali weqonga kunye nomqhubekisi kwiiprojekthi ezahlukeneyo. UCris Law waziwa kakhulu ngerebhivu yakhe kwiimuvi ezifana ne "American Pie", "Scary Movie", kunye ne "The Game Plan".  Ukufanoka kwakhe kuza kwimibintsi yakhe yeTV, apho abonakale kwiinkqubo ezifana ne "SVU" kunye ne "NCIS". Uyakwazi ukudlala iindima ezahlukeneyo, ukusuka kwiindima zokuhlekisa ukuya kwiindima ezinzulu. UCris Law ukwenzile umsebenzi wakhe njengomdlali weqonga, umqhubekisi, kunye nomvelisaji.  Njengeyona nto ibalulekileyo, uCris Law ukwaziwa ngumsebenzi wakhe wokuthatha inxaxheba kwimidlalo yeqonga. Wayesebenza neqonga leBroadway, apho abonakale kwimidlalo efana ne "Chicago" kunye ne "The Producers". Ukuthamani kwakhe kweqonga kuyabonakala kwimidlalo yakhe, apho athi abonakalise ubuhle bakhe njengomdlali weqonga.

sentence: Ibhobho likaTiberio, eyaziwa ngokuba yiPonte di Tiberio eRimini, iyingqekembe yembali eItali. Le bhobho yakhiwa ngo-21 AD, phantsi koBuyekezo bukaTiberio, yaza yagqitywa phantsi kobongozelo bukaCaligula. Ibekwe phezu koLwandle Adriatic, yaye ifezekisa umsebenzi wokudibanisa idolophu yaseRimini kunye nezinye iindawo ezingaselunxwempu.   Inkathalo yokuqala malunga nokwakhiwa kwebhobho yayikukuba lunxweme olusolileyo, kodwa ukhuseleko lwayo luye lwaphathwa njengesanele. Iminyaka edlulileyo, ibhobho iye yathweshwa ziinkanyamba ezininzi, kodwa isakunyamezelelanisa imithwalo yazo. Ukongeza, ibhobho iye yaba yinto ethandwayo kubathathi beekhona, abazithandayo ukuthatha imifanekiso kunye nokutamasha kuyo.  Nangona iminyaka yayo, ibhobho kaTiberio ibonwa njengophawu olubalulekileyo lwedolophu yaseRimini, kwaye ifakiwe njengenye yezinto ezinomtsalane zaseItali. Abavakashi baya kuyo ukuze babuke umbuko wolwandle, bazithathele imifanekiso, baze bafunde ngeembali zayo.

This aqueduct was built in 21 AD, under the reign of Tiberius, and completed under the rule of Caligula.
It is located on the Adriatic Sea, and serves the function of connecting the town of Rimini with other coastal locations.
The initial concern about the construction of the pipeline was that it had a fragile coastline, but its safety has been considered adequate.

Visitors go there to watch the sunset over the ocean, take pictures of it, and learn about its history.

sentence: IKerberus, inja enkulu yokulinda ehlathini, yinja ebhutyayo enomsila omde eyayingamhlolokazi. Eyaziwa ngokuba yiKhthonic, othetha ngolwimi lwamagorha namaqhathanka, uKerebus wayengumhlobo kaHadesi, kwakunye nomntu owaziwayo ngokugada isango lesihogo. Umxholo wolamla wawamthintela ukuba abeke ulawulo lwakhe phezu kwabo bafayo.  Ixesha lokuqala uKerebus wavela khona yayikukubaleka kwenkosi yaseAthens, uTheseus. UKerebus wayebambe amaQhawe ahlasela imbe uTheseus ekugqibela kwakhe ephuma kunxweme lwaseHadesi. Ukoyisa kwakhe kwakusithi uKerebus wayesesihogweni phantsi kwehlabathi.  Umbono kaKerebus uyabonakala kwimifanekiso yasekhaya yamaGrike. Wayezimele njengenja enkulu, enemihlathi emibini yaye engenawo amaphiko.

sentence: UJñānagarbha wayengumphilosopher ogqwesileyo waseTibet owenza igalelo elikhulu kwinkalo yefilosofi yebuddha. Uyaziwa kakhulu ngomsebenzi wakhe othi "Commentary on the Uttaratantra Shastra", apho achaza khona iingcamango ezibalulekileyo zefilosofi yebuddha, kuquka iingcamango ze-Tathagatagarbha kunye ne-Mahayana. Umbhalo kaJñānagarbha unephembelelo elikhulu kwinkalo yefilosofi yebuddha, yaye uthathwa njengomnye wabaphilosopher abakummandla waseTibet.  UJñānagarbha uphinde achaze iingcamango ze-voidness (shunyata) kunye ne-emptiness, ezibalulekileyo kwinkalo yefilosofi yebuddha. Umbhalo wakhe ubonisa ukuqonda okunzulu kwefilosofi yebuddha, yaye uphinde abonise indlela yokuqonda iingcamango ezintsonkileyo zefilosofi yebuddha.  Igalelo likaJñānagarbha kwinkalo yefilosofi yebuddha aligqibekanga, njengoko umbhalo wakhe usathathwa njengowenziwe ngobuchule bokufundisa. Abafundi beefilosofi yebuddha bayaqhubeka nokufunda umbhalo wakhe, yaye bathiwa nguwo njengomthombo owotshwanga wokufunda.

He is best known for his work "Commentary on the Uttaratantra Shastra", in which he explains important ideas of Buddhist philosophy, including the ideas of Tathagatagarbha and Mahayana.
Jñānagarbha's writing has had a great influence in the field of Buddhist philosophy, and he is considered one of the most important philosophers in the Tibetan area.

sentence: UDominic Joyce ungumbhali waseBrithani osebenze kakhulu kwiincwadi zembali kunye nophando lwembali. UJoyce waziwa kakhulu ngomsebenzi wakhe kwiimbali zaseYurophu, ngakumbi kwiinkalo zembali yezopolitiko kunye nembali yezosazi. Iincwadi zakhe ziye zashicilelwa kwiibhlobho ezinkulu zasesekhondeni kwaye ziye zaguqulelwa kwiilwimi ezininzi.  UJoyce ukwaziwa ngophando lwakhe olunzulu kunye nendlela yakhe yokubhala ecacileyo, eyenza iimbali zibe lula ukuqonda kubafundi abaninzi. Uye waphinda wasebenza njengomhleli kwiincwadi zembali, apho akwazi khona ukubonisa ubuchule bakhe bokubhala kunye nophando.  Kwiincwadi zakhe, uJoyce uhlala echaza iimbali ngokwendlela ezahlukeneyo, ezifana nembali yezopolitiko, inkcubeko, kunye nobumi. Oku kuye kwamsiza ekubeni abonise imbali yaseYurophu ngokweenkalo ezahlukeneyo, nokubonisa ukuba imbali ingaba mnandi kwaye ifundiseke.

Oku kuye kwamsiza ekubeni abonise imbali yaseYurophu ngokweenkalo ezahlukeneyo, nokubonisa ukuba imbali ingaba mnandi kwaye ifundiseke.

sentence: IGermani cisrhenani yingxenye yegrama eXhoseni ekhathaza abantu abaninzi. Inyaniso, xa sikhankanya ibinzana elithi "Germani cisrhenani", sifanekisa inkqubo yokwakha amagama ngesiXhosa. Esi sisakhono sokutshintsha iimpawu zokuphatha ibinzana elinye ukwenza elinye. Ukwazi ukusebenzisa esi sakhiwo kungenza kube lula ukufunda nokunyaniseka kokubhala ngesiXhosa.  Ukwazi iGermani cisrhenani kubalulekile kwabo bafuna ukuphucula ulwazi lwesiXhosa, ngakumbi abafundi abafunda esi sifundo njengolwimi lwesibini. Xa umntu ezuza ubuchule bokutshintsha ibinzana, angakwazi ukuvakalisa iingcinga zakhe ngokucopheleleyo.   Nangona esi sifundo sibalulekile, abaninzi bethu bajongana nenyani yokuba inkalamo yesiXhosa iyantlukwano. Esi sisizathu sokuba iGermani cisrhenani ibaluleke kakhulu ekufundiseni nasekufundeni.

sentence: Xa sikhankanya ukusetyenziswa kweGermani cisrhenani, apha sifika kwinqanaba lokuba intingintitha yamalizwi ingagcini nje kwimiyalelo yokwakha ibinzana. Esi sakhiwo sinokubonakalisa umahluko phakathi kolwimi olubhaliweyo nolwimi oluthethwayo. Abatoliki beengcali zolwimi bahlala bekhuthaza ukuhlaziywa kwesiXhosa sonke kuba kukho ukungafani okuninzi kuzo zonke iinkalo zolwimi.  Imibuzo yamalizwi, iintsingiselo zamabinzana, iimzwi ezingafani kwanokwahlukana kwentetho kuya kufundiswa ngononophelo. Ukwazi ukupakisha nokutshintsha ibinzana ngamagama esiXhosa kunokugcina umntu ekwenzeni iimpazamo xa ethetha okanye ebhala. Ukuba nabantu abanobuchule bokutshintsha ibinzana baya kuba nako ukudlulisela iingcinga zabo ngokucopheleleyo, kwanokunyaniseka kubafundi abafunda olu lwimi.  Ukusebenza ngokukuko kweGermani cisrhenani kunceda ekukhuthazeni ukusetyenziswa kwisiXhosa sonke. Abahambi njengesikhokelo seengcali zolwimi kuya kubanikwa izakhono zokuhlalutya nokufundisa esi sifundo ngokwahlukileyo.
